executives.name: Jan Bertsch
executives.background: Ms. Bertsch served as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Owens-Illinois, Inc. from 2015 to 2019.

executives.name: Kevin Stein
executives.background: Dr. Stein has served as President and CEO since 2018. He was COO from 2016 to 2018 and joined the company in 2014 as COO of the Power & Control Group. Previously, he held executive roles at Precision Castparts Corp.

executives.name: Mark Garrett
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President and CFO of Adobe Systems Incorporated.
